case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. JOSE GABRIEL MARTINEZ RUIZ

docket_entries.description: RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO PLAINTIFF

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $754.83 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, JOSE GABRIEL MARTINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
